title: WH_ERROR_MIN/MAX constants need a comment: update when new codes added
description: error.rs: WH_ERROR_MIN=-2302 and WH_ERROR_MAX=-2000 are the range endpoints for Error::check(). If wolfHSM ever adds codes outside this range, the check() will silently route them to Error::Ffi instead of Error::Wh. Add: // Update these if wh_error.h adds codes outside the current range.
